style_effects: Glowing embers drift upward in a slow, lazy spiral around Beedrill, each ember leaving a faint trail of molten gold. An intense crimson aura pulses rhythmically, casting sharp, flickering shadows that mimic flames licking the ground. The lighting mood is a warm amber glow with deep orange highlights, evoking the heat of a forge. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
